title: Dibs!
description: This mod lets you permanently bind any unemployed villager to any workstation block and bed of your choice.
body:
![Dibs!](https://i.imgur.com/0eOR95I.gif) Take control of villager profession and sleep assignment. Bind any villager to any workstation or bed permanently.
FEATURES
Permanent Villager-Workstation BindingVillagers who are unemployed can be permanently bound to a workstation
Permanent Villager-Bed BindingVillagers can be permanently bound to a bed
Protected WorkstationsOther villagers cannot gain a profession from a bound workstation
Protected BedsOther villagers cannot claim or sleep on a bound bed
Villager LocatorA glowing effect is applied to a villager, making them easy to find
Workstation/Bed LocatorA trail of white particles is applied from the villager to their bound workstation and/or bed
Auto-Cleanup On BreakBreaking a bound workstation or bed automatically releases the binding, freeing both the block and the villager
HOW TO USE
Binding a villager to a workstation: - Hold a stack of workstation items in your main hand (e.g. a composter, lectern, blast furnace, etc.). - Right-click an unemployed villager. A brief ritual begins, shown by happy particles around them. - One item from your stack is now bound to that villager (the rest remain unbound). - Place the bound item as a block anywhere in the world. - The villager will navigate to their workstation and gain the corresponding profession. Binding a villager to a bed: - Hold any bed in your main hand. - Right-click any villager (employed or unemployed). A brief ritual begins, shown by happy particles around them. - Place the bound bed anywhere in the world. - The villager will navigate to and sleep in that bed. Finding the villager or workstation/bed: - Look directly at the villager or the placed workstation/bed. - Press ![V](https://img.shields.io/badge/V-ffffff?style=plastic&color=ffffff), a particle effect will be applied.
CONFIGURATION
If you have Mod Menu installed, you can customize your experience:
Particle Duration (seconds)Determines how long the `happy_villager` particles play around the villager during the binding ritual
Glow Duration (seconds)Determines how long the assigned villager remains highlighted with the glowing effect when the V key is pressed
REQUIREMENTS
- Fabric Loader - Fabric API - Cloth Config API (1.21.x) - YetAnotherConfigLib (26.x) - Mod Menu (recommended for easy in-game configuration)
CLIENT & SERVER
Some functionality exists on both the client and the server, making the mod required for the server but optional for the client.
FREE & OPEN SOURCE
This is a completely free project. I'm not asking for donations or "buy me a coffee" contributions. If you enjoy the mod, the best way to support it is by: - Leaving a rating/review - Sharing it with friends - Reporting any bugs you find
GALLERY
Binding Ritual ![Binding Ritual](https://i.imgur.com/2QKZBJE.gif) Pressing V at a bound workstation block ![Pressing V](https://i.imgur.com/Bgj0pLl.gif)
